evidence: "Joaquin Phoenix did an excellent job as the dark hero."
"The direction, script, and acting were all very good."
"More back story would help to understand the main character."
"I fast forwarded the movie. I enjoyed it that way. It started too slowly..."
"I forced myself to watch the last 30 minutes."
"The actors do a good job, the direction is good..."
No specific directors or actors mentioned.
"I felt like I was online playing/yelling again."
"This movie paints a GRIM look at the apocalyptic future but it is well worth the time."
"This is not a family-friendly film due to the rash of necessary violence based on the focus of the story."
"OMG! This movie is the best movie ever."

summary: The user enjoys drama, action, and thriller genres, appreciating high-quality production and emotional depth in storytelling. They exhibit mixed feelings towards narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for engaging plots but with some confusion in execution.
